mnemonics: JAVA: Just Another Virtual Architecture (for remembering Java is a platform-independent architecture)
keyPoints: Java is platform-independent due to the Java Virtual Machine (JVM)
Java applications are compiled to bytecode, not machine code
Java's core principles are encapsulated in the phrase 'Write Once, Run Anywhere' (WORA)
commonMistakes: Confusing the JDK (Java Development Kit) with the JRE (Java Runtime Environment)
Forgetting that Java is case-sensitive (e.g., 'String' is not the same as 'string')
Assuming Java is the same as JavaScript
